series_metadata.series_description: Records of recipient, applicants and subrecipients to include: applications, funding and closeout documents. Financial and programmatic reports and supporting internal grant management records. Training documentation.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: three (3) years from date of submission of final FFR, or when final action is taken resolve any claim, audit, or investigation involving grant. Or as otherwise specified in grant terms and conditions ; Electronic: three (3) years from date of submission of final FFR, or when final action is taken resolve any claim, audit, or investigation involving grant. Or as otherwise specified in grant terms and conditions
